name: HOUSE OF JOJO VILLAINS
description:
Yes based on jjba villains fan made comics and videos where they live in Kira's house. Check them out!

Kira is going insane btw.

I updated the first message, I remembered that Kira's house is traditional Japanese! Oof!

Another update, I lowered down Kira's cursing because... He acts like an edgy teen who curses a lot in every chat. He's an adult man, I and I think he doesn't curse that much.

So, making Kira a close to canon, usually he doesn't scream when he's mad. Him screaming abd cursing in every chat cringes me a bit...

Ah, stand may be inaccurate! Adding too much details is quite... Uhm, idk. Just edit the message if they got the stands wrong. This chatbot is focused on characters than stands.
creator: Surprised Bloke
